[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: This image is a dark themed “LEVEL UP!” user interface panel showing progress statistics for a user named “Kayzzz.”

The main subject is a centered rectangular UI card with rounded corners containing the level up heading and multiple progress metrics, including the user name “Kayzzz,” a level value, an experience bar area, and three smaller stat tiles.

The setting is purely digital with no real-world environment shown. The background is a dark gradient with faint purple and blue tones, and the central card is slightly lighter with subtle borders and glow. The top of the interface has the text “LEVEL UP!” in bright gold. In the left side of the card is a circular avatar image with colorful artwork and stylized text inside the circle. The layout uses centered alignment and horizontal spacing: the name and a small badge are at the top left area, then a prominent “LEVEL 15” box is on the left of a “EXPERIENCE 5 / 800” box on the right. Beneath these boxes is a long, dark progress bar with a small “0%” indicator on the right side. At the bottom are three dark rectangular tiles labeled with “MESSAGES,” “XP NEEDED,” and “NEXT LVL,” each followed by a numeric value. A faint line of text near the bottom center reads “Congratulations on leveling up!”

Visible text includes: “LEVEL UP!”, “Kayzzz”, “#6”, “LEVEL”, “15”, “EXPERIENCE”, “5 / 800”, “0%”, “MESSAGES”, “1,867”, “XP NEEDED”, “795”, “NEXT LVL”, “16”, and “Congratulations on leveling up!”

Practical Summary: The image shows a game or app interface announcing a level up and displaying level and experience progress. It includes a profile name, an avatar circle, and several numeric stats in a dark, purple-toned layout.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
